name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN [msg \in 1..N |-> FALSE] ELSE messages[i] ]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = Append(file, <<>>)
       /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, <<>>)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, <<>>)
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, <<>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys, Txns, Values

VARIABLES db, txns, txnState, txnReadSet, txnWriteSet, txnWriteVals, t, transaction
TxnState == {"active", "committed", "aborted"}

(* The initial state: empty database, no active transactions *)
Init == /\ db = <<>>
       /\ txns = <<>>
       /\ txnState = [t \in Txns |-> "active"]
       /\ txnReadSet = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>
       /\ txnWriteSet = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>
       /\ txnWriteVals = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>]

(* Begin a transaction: add it to the set of active transactions *)
BeginTxn(t) == /\ t \notin txns
              /\ txns' = Append(txns, t)
              /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
              /\ txnReadSet' = [txnReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = <<>>
              /\ txnWriteSet' = [txnWriteSet EXCEPT ![t] = <<>>
              /\ txnWriteVals' = [txnWriteVals EXCEPT ![t] = <<>>]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<db>>

(* Read a key: add it to the transaction's read set *)
Read(t, k) == /\ t \in txns
              /\ k \in Keys(db)
              /\ txnReadSet' = [txnReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = Append(txnReadSet[t], k)]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, txnState, txnWriteSet, txnWriteVals>>

(* Write a key: add it to the transaction's write set and record the intended value *)
Write(t, k, v) == /\ t \in txns
                  /\ k \in Keys(db)
                  /\ txnWriteSet' = [txnWriteSet EXCEPT ![t] = Append(txnWriteSet[t], k)]
                  /\ txnWriteVals' = [txnWriteVals EXCEPT ![t] = [txnWriteVals[t] EXCEPT ![k] = v]]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, txnState, txnReadSet>>

(* Commit a transaction: check for write-write conflicts *)
Commit(t) == /\ t \in txns
              /\ txnState[t] = "active"
              /\ \A k \in txnWriteSet[t] : \A t' \in txns : t' # t /\ txnState[t'] = "committed" /\ k \in txnWriteSet[t']
              /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = txnWriteVals[t][k] : k \in txnWriteSet[t]]
              /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
              /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
              /\ txnReadSet' = [txnReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
              /\ txnWriteSet' = [txnWriteSet EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
              /\ txnWriteVals' = [txnWriteVals EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]

(* Abort a transaction: discard its writes *)
Abort(t) == /\ t \in txns
              /\ txnState[t] = "active"
              /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
              /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
              /\ txnReadSet' = [txnReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
              /\ txnWriteSet' = [txnWriteSet EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
              /\ txnWriteVals' = [txnWriteVals EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<db>>

(* The Next action: a nondeterministic choice among BeginTxn, Read, Write, Commit, Abort *)
Next == \/ \E t \in Txns : BeginTxn(t)
      \/ \E t \in Txns : \E k \in Keys(db) : Read(t, k)
      \/ \E t \in Txns : \E k \in Keys(db) : \E v \in Values : Write(t, k, v)
      \/ \E t \in Txns : Commit(t)
      \/ \E t \in Txns : Abort(t)

(* The specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, txnState, txnReadSet, txnWriteSet, txnWriteVals>>

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Keys(db) \in Seq(Values)]
           /\ txns \in Seq(Txns)
           /\ txnState \in [Txns -> TxnState]
           /\ txnReadSet \in [Txns -> Seq(Keys(db))]
           /\ txnWriteSet \in [Txns -> Seq(Keys(db))]
           /\ txnWriteVals \in [Txns -> [Keys(db) -> Values]]

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = infected \cup known

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free'

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

(* --state Init
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --state Increment
counts[n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1
*)

(* --state Merge
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][m], counts'[n][m])]]
*)

(* --state GlobalCount
globalCount = Sum([n \in Node |-> Max({counts[n][m] : m \in Node})])
*)

(* --state TypeOK
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

(* --state Spec
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)
